/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/perception_bowl.dir/perception.cpp.o -o perception_bowl  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/librealsense2.2.57.7.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_dnn.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/librsutils.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_imgproc.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_core.4.13.0.dylib
